Letra_cifra:
This tab was created because other tabs only contained 
the melody, but there was no rhythm guitar.
but I never found a name attached to it. However, out 
of respect, I won't claim it as my own.

The rest I figured out, though; real simple riff.
The song is made for two guitars: lead (melody riff) 
& rhythm (other riffs)
Tabbed by: qweyet_Gi
